summary.topInsight: The best roadmap candidates combine customer pain, strategic fit, metric readiness, and realistic delivery scope.

initiatives.problem_statement: Recruiters need faster shortlists that still preserve role fit, interview readiness, and candidate preference signals.

initiatives.initiative: Mobile profile completion and interview prep flow
initiatives.problem_statement: Candidates abandon profile setup when resume, skills, availability, and interview prep are split across too many steps.

initiatives.initiative: Learner progress and mentor intervention hub
initiatives.problem_statement: Course teams need earlier signals when a learner is likely to stall before interview preparation begins.

initiatives.initiative: SaaS support triage and SLA risk console
initiatives.customer_segment: managed service clients and support engineers
initiatives.problem_statement: Support leads need to see SLA risk, product defects, client tier, and engineering ownership before issues breach.

initiatives.initiative: Client project health and acceptance workspace
initiatives.problem_statement: Client sponsors need one place to review requirements, delivery risk, acceptance criteria, and milestone decisions.

initiatives.initiative: Cross-service executive KPI and roadmap review
initiatives.problem_statement: Leaders need a common metric contract that connects funnel health, delivery outcomes, support risk, and roadmap tradeoffs.

backlog.user_story: As a placement operations lead, I need the decision context in one place so I can prioritize work without chasing disconnected updates.
backlog.acceptance_criteria: Context includes customer signal, metric, owner, dependency, and decision date.

backlog.user_story: As a product manager, I need a launch metric contract so I can evaluate success before release work starts.
backlog.acceptance_criteria: Primary metric, guardrail metric, data source, event owner, and baseline are documented.

backlog.user_story: As an engineering lead, I need clear acceptance criteria so sprint delivery matches the product intent.
backlog.acceptance_criteria: Acceptance criteria cover happy path, edge cases, instrumentation, QA evidence, and rollback notes.
